scenario_scope: Real local-project intake decision for the pinned Corben's Best Model Possible recurrent-model, adapter-bank, architecture-search, compiler, memory, router, governance, verification, tool, speech, and evaluation snapshot.

cases.decision_rationale: Shared-weight shell/core recurrence, explicit route topology, train/inference iteration mismatch, fixed-step quality authority, KL/entropy halting, and first-hit/last-correct overthinking telemetry strengthen the existing adaptive-compute treatment when bounded as fixed-feature mechanism research.
required_before_drafting: separate unique blocks, effective recurrence, fixed generated state, and trainable state
map architecture comparisons to exact matched-budget artifacts
ingest independent recurrent-transformer and adaptive-computation literature
evidence_transition_preconditions: matched initialization, data, steps, and hardware receipts
quality compared against fixed-step and latency-matched baselines
accepted transition required for any support-state change
promotion_blockers: inner trunk is frozen in the inspected training path
current workspace tests were not reproduced
retained results do not establish general capability
non_claims: does not establish that recurrent sharing matches separately trained depth
does not establish adaptive-compute gains on external tasks

cases.decision_rationale: Seven explicit specialist adapters, composition edges, fixed-slice lane matrices, and regression gates provide a concrete specialist-bank reference; explicit/oracle lane metadata, unchanged-lane zero deltas, and default probe features define the evidence boundary between a bank and an autonomous router.
required_before_drafting: distinguish artifact isolation from shared-state interference
evidence_transition_preconditions: autonomous router compared with oracle and single-adapter baselines
runtime receipt proves the selected checkpoint executed
promotion_blockers: current routing depends on explicit lane metadata
ordinary solve uses fixed default probe features
non_claims: does not claim autonomous mixture-of-experts routing
does not infer no interference from unchanged adapters

cases.decision_rationale: The fixed deterministic trunk, adapter-only updates, position-specific byte table, pooled-backend representation limit, model/runtime response disconnect, and mixed metric origins make a strong implementation case for trainable-state manifests, response-causality receipts, verification method labels, and metric provenance classes.
required_before_drafting: map every claim to generated, frozen, trainable, and updated tensors
trace returned text through model logits, decoding, and specialist substitutions
label retained numbers as local adapter-validation observations only
evidence_transition_preconditions: checkpoint perturbation changes the decoded response through the claimed causal path
metrics identify measured, derived, modeled, constant, declared, proxy, vacuous, or unknown origin
promotion_blockers: no general autoregressive checkpoint-driven generation path was established
pooled adapter cannot express general varying target sequences
several metrics are constants, formulas, declarations, or vacuous passes
non_claims: does not claim a trained foundation model or general language generation
does not treat local adapter loss as model capability

cases.decision_rationale: Task spells, contract fields, semantic/target IR, TaskIR, and localized repair are useful compiler interfaces; prefix/keyword parsing, linear plans, digest-string parity, positional repair identities, trace-only memory transitions, and playback replay specify the required stronger semantics.
required_before_drafting: separate interface schema from semantic preservation evidence
map compiler and memory concepts to CCA and MoECOT provenance
evidence_transition_preconditions: field-level contract lineage and adversarial preservation tests
restart-visible freeze, thaw, tier, promotion, and compaction effects
promotion_blockers: digest parity is not a semantic equivalence test
ordinary solve does not invoke the full compiler path
several memory transitions are non-durable or trace-only
non_claims: does not establish compiler correctness or verified localized repair
does not establish durable semantic memory or deterministic live replay

cases.decision_rationale: The generic executable tool, partially enforced capability envelope, non-monotone contradiction policy, shape-level tribunal predicates, and first-party tone codec supply concrete negative cases for authority enforcement, monotone containment, verification independence, and ownership-versus-capability distinctions.
required_before_drafting: separate the bounded normal runtime probes from the reusable arbitrary executable adapter
define semantic verification method classes and independence edges
word speech only as local signal/codec scaffolding
evidence_transition_preconditions: operating-system enforcement of every declared capability
natural-audio STT and intelligibility evaluation for any speech claim
promotion_blockers: capability declarations are not comprehensively enforced
several tribunal checks are string, shape, dependent, or vacuous
speech tests use self-generated tones or acoustic units
non_claims: does not establish safe arbitrary code execution or independent verification
does not establish general speech recognition or natural synthesis

cases.decision_rationale: A metric-origin algebra and response-causality receipt could justify a distinct boundary, but both currently fit within evidence discipline, benchmark ratchets, artifact graphs, and integrated architecture. The all-project synthesis must determine whether the concept has enough unique material for a chapter.
required_before_drafting: map independent measurement and causal-provenance literature
define a unique chapter thesis and manifest position
evidence_transition_preconditions: machine-readable metric-origin schema validated on multiple projects
response-causality receipt demonstrated end to end
promotion_blockers: substantial overlap with existing evidence and benchmark chapters
non_claims: does not add the proposed chapter
does not claim the taxonomy is novel or complete

validation_boundary: Records existing-chapter routes and a deferred metric-provenance boundary. It does not validate model learning, general generation, routing, compiler semantics, durable memory, sandbox enforcement, live replay, natural speech, external performance, publication rights, or a support-state transition.
non_claims: does not publish private source, corpus, checkpoint, or artifact material
